title: Fabric Lobby
description: Fabric Server-Side mod that adds /lobby command to teleport to a configurable location, and another to go back to where you were.
body:
Simple mod that adds:
- `/lobby` command with a configurable x y and z and dimension.
- `/worldtp` command that teleports you back to where you were before running lobby.
- added the configurable ability to automatically tp players on join
- now saves player world too, and saves location when a player leaves

Thanks to ModMuss for fabric mod template.
